description_long: This object is a classic, boxy camera with a metallic top and bottom, and a textured, dark central body. The front features a prominent, round lens with a ribbed design, surrounded by several metallic buttons and dials, including a viewfinder window and a lever. The top of the camera is equipped with multiple control dials and a conical shutter button, all rendered in a shiny metallic finish. The back is plain and flat, with no visible screen or controls, suggesting a vintage or analog design. The sides are flat, with the lens protruding significantly from the front face. The overall construction appears robust, with a combination of metal and plastic materials, and the design is reminiscent of mid-20th-century rangefinder cameras.
description: A vintage-style box camera with a metallic top and bottom, a textured dark body, and a large ribbed lens protruding from the front. It features several metallic dials and buttons, evoking a classic analog design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large ribbed lens, viewfinder window, and multiple metallic buttons and dials.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the significant protrusion of the lens and the flat, metallic side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, flat back with no visible controls or screen, emphasizing the camera's boxy shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the lens profile and the flat side, with minimal visible features.
